project.name: Number Match Puzzle Game
project.description: Classic number matching puzzle game with deterministic seeding, difficulty sawtooth curves, and complement-based rescue engines.

nodes.summary: Technical design document describing the seeder, difficulty curve, and add-row complements algorithm.

layers.name: Core Engine Layer
layers.description: Contains deterministic seeder, difficulty scaling engines, solvability validator, and matching logic for both Web and Android.

layers.name: UI & Presentation Layer
layers.description: Contains HTML, CSS, layouts, Android activities, custom grid drawings, and frontend orchestrators.

layers.name: Configuration & Infrastructure Layer
layers.description: Build system definitions, packaging configurations, Vercel deployments, and manifest declarations.

layers.name: Documentation Layer
layers.description: User manuals, algorithm design documents, and architectural guides.

layers.name: Testing & Simulation Layer
layers.description: Unit testing suites, human-play simulator models, and verification scripts.

tour.title: Project Overview & Architecture
tour.description: Welcome to the Number Match Puzzle Game! Start with the README to understand the core game rules, visual design guidelines, and the dual Web/Android architecture.

tour.title: Deterministic Algorithm Specifications
tour.description: Review the technical specifications in ALGORITHM.md details on the seed-based board generator and the complements-based rescue row system.

tour.title: Web Application Entry Point
tour.description: Inspect index.html to see how the web interface layouts, levels selectors, dynamic add-row indicators, and canvas screens are structured.

tour.title: Web Orchestrator & Controller
tour.description: Dive into game.js, which manages global user actions, cell selection highlight, dynamic timers, and UI updates.

tour.title: Deterministic Board Seeder
tour.description: Analyze BoardGenerator.ts to see the core seeder algorithm that enforces minimum distance gaps between matching pairs and injects true decoys.

tour.title: Intelligent Add Row Planner
tour.description: Examine AddRowPlanner.ts, which scans the active board state, isolates stranded orphan digits, and appends only their exact complement partners to prevent impossible grids.

tour.title: Solvability Solver & Graph Validator
tour.description: Study SolutionGraph.ts, which uses a Breadth-First Search (BFS) search tree to test whether the game remains winnable at every step.

tour.title: Android Game Engine Parity
tour.description: Understand how logic parity is maintained in Java by examining AddRowEngine.java, which implements the exact same complement-based rescue calculations.

tour.title: Android Rendering & Custom Drawing
tour.description: Look at GridView.java to see how the 9-column grid is drawn, how lines are highlighted, and how touch input is processed natively.
